zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Henry De Fulford於1252年出生在英國英格蘭戴文格亞特 福爾福德。她於大約1276年與Henry de Fulford在英國戴文格亞特 福爾福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1302年享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fulford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named in Devon, such as Fulford in Tiverton, Great Fulford in Dunsford, Fullaford in High Bray, Fulford Bridge in Shebbear, Fullaford in Sampford Courtenay, and Fullaford in Buckfastleigh.

habitational name from one or more of the various places so called elsewhere in England, such as Fulford (Staffordshire), Fulford in Kingston Saint Mary (Somerset), Gate Fulford and Water Fulford (both East Yorkshire), Fulfords Farm in Itchingfield (Sussex), and Fulforth in Witton Gilbert (Durham). All places in 1 above and 2 are named from Old English fūl ‘dirty, muddy’ + ford ‘ford’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Henry De Fulford was born in 1252, in Great Fulford, Devon, England, United Kingdom. She married Henry de Fulford about 1276, in Great Fulford, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1302, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs Henry De Fulford est née en 1252, à Great Fulford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Henry de Fulford environ 1276, à Great Fulford, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1302, à l’âge de 50 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Henry De Fulfordは1252年にイギリスイギリスデボングレアト フウルフォードで生まれた。約1276年にイギリスデボングレアト フウルフォードでHenry de Fulfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1302年に50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Henry De Fulford(은)는 1252년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 그리트 프퍼드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1276년 영국 데폰 그리트 프퍼드에서 Henry de Fulford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1302년 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Henry De Fulford родилась в 1252 г. в местности грит фьулфорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Fulford около 1276 г. в местности грит фьулфорд, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1302 г. в возрасте 50 лет.
